lints.name: unindexed_foreign_keys
lints.title: Unindexed foreign keys
lints.description: Identifies foreign key constraints without a covering index, which can impact database performance.
lints.detail: Table \`public.prompt_shares\` has a foreign key \`prompt_shares_created_by_fkey\` without a covering index. This can lead to suboptimal query performance.

lints.name: auth_rls_initplan
lints.title: Auth RLS Initialization Plan
lints.description: Detects if calls to \`current_setting()\` and \`auth.<function>()\` in RLS policies are being unnecessarily re-evaluated for each row
lints.detail: Table \`public.prompts\` has a row level security policy \`Users can view their own prompts\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.
lints.cache_key: auth_rls_init_plan_public_prompts_Users can view their own prompts

lints.name: multiple_permissive_policies
lints.title: Multiple Permissive Policies
lints.description: Detects if multiple permissive row level security policies are present on a table for the same \`role\` and \`action\` (e.g. insert). Multiple permissive policies are suboptimal for performance as each policy must be executed for every relevant query.
lints.detail: Table \`public.api_tokens\` has multiple permissive policies for role \`anon\` for action \`SELECT\`. Policies include \`{"API tokens can be validated by token","Users can view own tokens"}\`

lints.name: multiple_permissive_policies
lints.title: Multiple Permissive Policies
lints.description: Detects if multiple permissive row level security policies are present on a table for the same \`role\` and \`action\` (e.g. insert). Multiple permissive policies are suboptimal for performance as each policy must be executed for every relevant query.
lints.detail: Table \`public.api_tokens\` has multiple permissive policies for role \`authenticated\` for action \`SELECT\`. Policies include \`{"API tokens can be validated by token","Users can view own tokens"}\`

lints.title: Multiple Permissive Policies
lints.description: Detects if multiple permissive row level security policies are present on a table for the same \`role\` and \`action\` (e.g. insert). Multiple permissive policies are suboptimal for performance as each policy must be executed for every relevant query.
lints.detail: Table \`public.api_tokens\` has multiple permissive policies for role \`dashboard_user\` for action \`SELECT\`. Policies include \`{"API tokens can be validated by token","Users can view own tokens"}\`

lints.name: multiple_permissive_policies

lints.detail: Table \`public.plaza_likes\` has multiple permissive policies for role \`anon\` for action \`DELETE\`. Policies include \`{"Allow delete for authenticated",用户可以移除自己的点赞}\`

lints.name: duplicate_index
lints.title: Duplicate Index
lints.description: Detects cases where two ore more identical indexes exist.
lints.detail: Table \`public.tags\` has identical indexes {idx_tags_name,tags_name_idx}. Drop all except one of them
